description_long: This is a two-story police station building with a modern, boxy design and a flat roof that features a helipad marked with a large 'H' and white boundary lines. The front facade prominently displays the word 'POLICE' in bold, block letters above the main entrance, flanked by stylized cross emblems. The ground floor has large glass double doors at the center, surrounded by wide, rectangular windows, while the upper floor also features a row of evenly spaced windows. The building is primarily blue and white, with blue trim accentuating the roofline and window frames. The structure appears to be constructed from concrete or masonry with glass windows and metal framing. The overall appearance is clean, functional, and easily identifiable as a civic building intended for public safety.
description: A modern, two-story police station with a blue and white facade, large windows, and a rooftop helipad. The front features bold 'POLICE' signage and a central glass entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'POLICE' sign, double glass doors, and large windows on both floors.
description_view_1: Side view with no windows or doors, showing the blue trim and the helipad on the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with plain walls and no visible windows or doors, helipad visible on the roof.
description_view_3: Back/side view with a row of large windows on the lower floor and a plain upper floor, helipad visible.
attribute_police_signage: Large, bold 'POLICE' text in white block letters above the main entrance on the front facade, flanked by stylized cross emblems.
attribute_building_facade_features: Large glass double doors, wide rectangular windows on both floors, blue trim, prominent 'POLICE' signage, stylized cross emblems, flat roof with helipad.
